mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username, u.avatar as user_avatar, CASE WHEN cl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_liked FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN comment_like cl ON cl.comment_id = c.id AND cl.user_id = #{userId} WHERE c.novel_id = #{novelId} AND c.chapter_num = #{chapterNum} AND c.parent_id IS NULL AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.like_count DESC, c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.*, u.username, u.avatar as user_avatar, CASE WHEN cl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_liked FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN comment_like cl ON cl.comment_id = c.id AND cl.user_id = #{userId} WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (user_id, novel_id, chapter_num, content, parent_id, like_count, reply_count, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{novelId}, #{chapterNum}, #{content}, #{parentId}, 0, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE comment SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE comment SET reply_count = reply_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
SELECT c.*, u.username, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} AND chapter_num = #{chapterNum} AND parent_id IS NULL AND status = 1

SELECT c.*, u.username, u.avatar as user_avatar, CASE WHEN cl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_liked FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN comment_like cl ON cl.comment_id = c.id AND cl.user_id = #{userId} WHERE c.novel_id = #{novelId} AND c.chapter_num = #{chapterNum} AND c.parent_id IS NULL AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT c.*, u.username, u.avatar as user_avatar, CASE WHEN cl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_liked FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN comment_like cl ON cl.comment_id = c.id AND cl.user_id = #{userId} WHERE c.novel_id = #{novelId} AND c.chapter_num = #{chapterNum} AND c.parent_id IS NULL AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.like_count DESC, c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
